UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.Activate.Description: Activates when receiving a signal from the selected channel if the sending player meets the requirements.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.Disable.Description: Disables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel. If set to the same channel as Enable When Receiving From, this will toggle the enabled state.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.Enable.Description: Enables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel. If set to the same channel as Disable When Receiving From, this will toggle the enabled state.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.Reset.Description: Resets the device to its initial state on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.On Not Enough Items.Desc: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when the device fails to activate due to the player not having the required item(s).
UserOptionDefinition.BP_LockDevice_C.On Activated.Description: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when the device is activated.
